mapper.select: select date(created_at) as statDate, count(1) as total from logistics_order where deleted = 0 and created_at >= timestampadd(day, #{daysOffset}, current_timestamp) group by date(created_at) order by statDate

select date_format(update_time, '%Y-%m') as statMonth, coalesce(sum(actual_fee), 0) as total from logistics_fee where deleted = 0 and payment_status = 'PAID' and update_time >= timestampadd(month, #{monthsOffset}, current_timestamp) group by date_format(update_time, '%Y-%m') order by statMonth
